title: Microsoft takes over a Texas AI data center expansion after OpenAI backs away

title: Apple Brings On Google Shopping VP to Lead AI Marketing Push
description: Apple has hired former Google VP Lilian Rincon as its vice president of product marketing for artificial intelligence, reports Axios. Before joining Apple, Rincon was vice president of product for Google Shopping. At Apple, Rincon will be in charge of product marketing and product management for all of Apple's AI platforms, reporting to Apple marketing chief Greg Joswiak.
